# Prestige Selections GmbH

> Luxury sports car and classic car dealership in Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany. Specializing in Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, and Maserati since 2012.

## About

Prestige Selections GmbH is a premium automotive dealer founded in 2012 by Jerome Gay. Located at Engesserstrasse 1, 79108 Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany. Over 900 vehicles sold. The dealership operates a Meister-Werkstatt (master-certified workshop) with 5 specialists for luxury and classic car maintenance, repair, restoration, and detailing.

## Contact

- Phone: +49 761 5573168
- Email: info@prestige-selections.com
- Address: Engesserstrasse 1, 79108 Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany
- Website: https://www.prestige-selections.com

## Services

- Vehicle Sales: Handpicked luxury sports cars and classic cars
- Workshop: Manufacturer-standard maintenance for all premium brands
- Repair: Expert repairs using original parts
- Classic Car Care: Restoration and preservation of automotive classics
- Detailing: Professional vehicle preparation and care

## Brands

Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, Maserati, Mercedes-Benz

## Languages

German (primary), English, French
